name: CreateRecord
notes: Creates a standalone record object that can be populated before save processing.

name: GetField
notes: Fetches a field object from the current record and is commonly used before validation.

name: MessageBox
signature: MessageBox(style, title, set, number, default_txt [, paramlist]) Returns Number
notes: Displays a modal message to the user and optionally substitutes values into the message text.

name: SQLExec
notes: Runs a single SQL statement immediately and maps result columns into output variables.

name: Rowset.Fill
notes: Loads rows into an existing rowset using a where clause and optional bind values.
